name: flight-goat-pp-mcp
description: AeroAPI is a simple, query-based API that gives software developers access to a variety of FlightAware's flight data.

flight_goat_api_key.title: FLIGHT_GOAT_API_KEY
flight_goat_api_key.description: Sets FLIGHT_GOAT_API_KEY for the Flight GOAT MCP server.

flight_goat_env.title: FLIGHT_GOAT_ENV
flight_goat_env.description: Sets FLIGHT_GOAT_ENV for the endpoint template variable {env}.
